results.question: What is the total revenue across all transactions?

results.question: What is the total revenue in 2023?
results.gold_sql: SELECT SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dim_dates d ON f.event_date_key = d.date_key WHERE d.year = 2023;
results.generated_sql: SELECT SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dim_dates d ON f.event_date_key = d.date_key WHERE d.year = 2023

results.question: What is the total revenue broken down by year?
results.gold_sql: SELECT d.year, SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dim_dates d ON f.event_date_key = d.date_key GROUP BY d.year ORDER BY d.year;
results.generated_sql:
SELECT d.year,
       SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue
FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f
JOIN bl_dm.dim_dates d ON f.event_date_key = d.date_key
GROUP BY d.year
ORDER BY d.year

results.question: What is the total revenue in Q1 2024?
results.gold_sql: SELECT SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dim_dates d ON f.event_date_key = d.date_key WHERE d.year = 2024 AND d.quarter = 1;
results.generated_sql: SELECT SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dim_dates d ON f.event_date_key = d.date_key WHERE EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM d.full_date) = 1 AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM d.full_date) = 2024

results.question: What is the total revenue for each month in 2022?
results.gold_sql: SELECT d.month_num, d.month_name, SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dim_dates d ON f.event_date_key = d.date_key WHERE d.year = 2022 GROUP BY d.month_num, d.month_name ORDER BY d.month_num;
results.generated_sql: SELECT date_trunc('month', to_timestamp(d.date_key)) AS MONTH, SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dim_dates d ON f.event_date_key = d.date_key WHERE date_part('year', to_timestamp(d.date_key)) = 2022 GROUP BY MONTH

results.question: Which month in 2023 had the highest total gross profit?
results.gold_sql: SELECT d.month_name, SUM(f.transaction_gross_profit) AS total_gross_profit FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dim_dates d ON f.event_date_key = d.date_key WHERE d.year = 2023 GROUP BY d.month_num, d.month_name ORDER BY total_gross_profit DESC LIMIT 1;
results.generated_sql: SELECT d.month_num, d.month_name, SUM(f.transaction_gross_profit) AS total_gross_profit FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dim_dates d ON f.event_date_key = d.date_key WHERE d.year = 2023 GROUP BY d.month_num, d.month_name ORDER BY total_gross_profit DESC LIMIT 1

results.question: What is the total revenue by product category?

results.question: Who are the top 5 customers from the United States by total revenue in 2023?
results.gold_sql: SELECT c.customer_firstname, c.customer_lastname, SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dm_customers_scd c ON f.customer_surr_id = c.customer_surr_id JOIN bl_dm.dim_dates d ON f.event_date_key = d.date_key WHERE c.is_active = TRUE AND c.customer_country = 'United States' AND d.year = 2023 GROUP BY c.customer_src_id, c.customer_firstname, c.customer_lastname ORDER BY total_revenue DESC LIMIT 5;
results.generated_sql:
SELECT c.customer_firstname, c.customer_lastname,
       SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue
FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f
JOIN bl_dm.dm_customers_scd c ON f.customer_surr_id = c.customer_surr_id
                              AND c.is_active = TRUE
JOIN bl_dm.dim_dates d   ON f.event_date_key = d.date_key
WHERE c.customer_country ILIKE '%United States%'
      AND d.year = 2023
GROUP BY c.customer_src_id, c.customer_firstname, c.customer_lastname
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 5

       SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue
FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f
JOIN bl_dm.dm_junk_transactions j ON f.junk_surr_id = j.junk_surr_id
JOIN bl_dm.dm_products p ON f.product_surr_id = p.product_surr_id
GROUP BY j.junk_sales_channel, p.product_category
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC

results.question: What is the total revenue generated by each employee working in stores in New York?
results.gold_sql: SELECT e.employee_firstname, e.employee_lastname, SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.v_employees_public e ON f.employee_surr_id = e.employee_surr_id WHERE e.is_active = TRUE AND e.employee_store_branch_state = 'Ny' GROUP BY e.employee_surr_id, e.employee_firstname, e.employee_lastname ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;
results.generated_sql:
SELECT e.employee_firstname, e.employee_lastname,
       SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue
FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f
JOIN bl_dm.v_employees_public e ON f.employee_surr_id = e.employee_surr_id
                                AND e.is_active = TRUE
JOIN bl_dm.dm_store_branches b ON e.employee_store_branch_src_id = b.store_branch_src_id
WHERE b.store_branch_state = 'Ny'
GROUP BY e.employee_src_id, e.employee_firstname, e.employee_lastname
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC NULLS LAST

results.question: What is the total revenue by shipping method and product category?
results.gold_sql: SELECT sh.shipping_method, p.product_category, SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dm_shippings sh ON f.shipping_surr_id = sh.shipping_surr_id JOIN bl_dm.dm_products p ON f.product_surr_id = p.product_surr_id GROUP BY sh.shipping_method, p.product_category ORDER BY sh.shipping_method, total_revenue DESC;

JOIN bl_dm.dm_products     p ON f.product_surr_id = p.product_surr_id

results.question: Which product has the highest average profit margin?
results.gold_sql: SELECT p.product_name, AVG(f.transaction_profit_margin) AS avg_profit_margin FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dm_products p ON f.product_surr_id = p.product_surr_id GROUP BY p.product_surr_id, p.product_name ORDER BY avg_profit_margin DESC LIMIT 1;

results.question: How many transactions were placed on weekends?
results.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS weekend_transactions FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dim_dates d ON f.event_date_key = d.date_key WHERE d.is_weekend = TRUE;
results.generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(f.transaction_src_id) AS num_transactions FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dim_dates d ON f.event_date_key = d.date_key WHERE d.is_weekend = TRUE

results.question: What is the total revenue from transactions placed on weekends versus weekdays?
results.gold_sql: SELECT d.is_weekend, SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dim_dates d ON f.event_date_key = d.date_key GROUP BY d.is_weekend ORDER BY d.is_weekend;
results.generated_sql:
SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN d.is_weekend = TRUE THEN f.transaction_sale_amount ELSE 0 END) AS weekend_revenue,
       SUM(CASE WHEN d.is_weekend = FALSE THEN f.transaction_sale_amount ELSE 0 END) AS weekday_revenue
FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f
JOIN bl_dm.dim_dates d ON f.event_date_key = d.date_key
WHERE d.is_weekend IN (TRUE, FALSE)

results.question: What is the total revenue from transactions where the discount was greater than 20%?
results.gold_sql: SELECT SUM(transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd WHERE transaction_discount_pct > 20;
results.generated_sql: SELECT SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f WHERE f.transaction_discount_pct > 0.20
